name: task-ESE-0022
title: Extract dynamic ramp-up perf testing framework from ESE-0020
description: Extract the dynamic ramp-up performance testing pattern from ESE-0020 into a reusable framework. The framework should: (1) run a test function each frame, (2) increase a parameter (grid size, operation count, etc.) until FPS drops below a threshold, (3) record and report the results. Reusable across tilemap perf tests and future performance benchmarks.
demoDeliverable: Terminal output from a sample ramp-up test demonstrating the framework.
